ModMetaData.name: Zoology: Realistic Animal Overhaul
ModMetaData.author: AbobaShark
ModMetaData.description: Zoology rewrites animals in the game from the ground up. It replaces vanilla stats with values derived from real-life zoological parameters, adds a host of behavior options (pack hunting, prey defense, mammal lactation, scavenging, pet ignorance by raiders), and provides modder-facing extensions so other mods can integrate cleanly. Combat behavior and damage are adjusted to remain balanced in-game while offering a far more biologically plausible experience.
